Appearances:
Plaintiff Jones Street Apartments LLC is present. Represented by Siroche Kabana.
Attorney Michael McLaughlin appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Todd Butillo is present.
Attorney Nate Bigger representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of May-7-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
